description:
Parent epic: V3 E5: Controls and human in the loop

Source task 3/9 from MILESTONE_V3.md:

- Delete hook-like concepts unless they have a clear lifecycle purpose in the
  V3 model.

Epic closure criteria:
- Controls are the one public policy concept
- human-in-the-loop is demonstrated without new runtime machinery
- raising controls cannot crash the agent process

comments.text: Satisfied by the controls/lifecycle split: Jidoka.Guardrail is hidden as an implementation detail, while Jidoka.Hook remains documented only for lifecycle callbacks. Policy decisions now point to Jidoka.Control.

title: E5: Delete hook-like concepts unless they have a clear lifecycle purpose in the V3...
